variants.name: Sticker Zine
variants.description: Coral + violet + mustard on warm cream. Highlighter marks, scribble underlines, rotated pill logo, enamel-style stickers. Max personality.

variants.name: Risograph Press
variants.description: Two-color overprint, halftone patterns, stamps, deliberate misregistration. Artisanal editorial feel.

variants.name: Bubblegum Bauhaus
variants.description: Bauhaus shapes in pastels. Softest, most broadly likeable.

variants.name: Neon Hypebeast
variants.description: Dark-mode playful. Outlined display text with neon lime + hot pink. Edgiest of the four.
